endpoints.name: Elemental monkey trio (Pansage / Pansear / Panpour line)

description: Second corpus Pansage print (DAA-006) attaches to the existing elemental-monkey-trio node as the sixth member-print across the cohort. The node's appears_on list extends; the card's frontmatter gets the characters: [elemental-monkey-trio] pointer. Cohort membership predicates on species identity not set or printing, per the node's own caveat. The cohort stack now contains 5 species (3 base forms + 2 evolved) across 6 prints, with Simipour still the only canonically-missing species. The DAA-006 Pansage (Mina Nakai art, berry-gathering flavor) extends the speak-no-evil-as-care register from the BUS-12 print's leaf-sharing flavor into a foraging-as-generosity framing — same role, second illustrator.
files_modified: cards/_characters/elemental-monkey-trio.md (appears_on extended; body section gained second Pansage print entry)
other_candidates_considered: Rowlet (CSE-18) ↔ Dartrix (DAA-012) Alola Grass starter evolution mirror — Dartrix is bare-stub vision-only (tags_hub: [], no trivia), Rowlet is fully trivia-passed. The mirror would be thinner than wave 19 Sobble/Drizzile (which both had vision). Defer until Dartrix vision lands.
Cosmog ↔ Lunatone celestial cluster — tag-bridge stretch (both cosmos-themed but different generations, no canonical interaction). Refused per wave 20 precedent.

Alolan Graveler ↔ Alolan Grimer regional-variant cohort start — 2 Alolan-form corpus members, below the typical 3-card cohort threshold. Could match the galarian-regional-forms node's start-at-3 precedent if one more Alolan form lands. Defer one more wave.
Siebold solo Mr. Nodeley — 1 Kalos E4 only, premature for cohort. Defer.
Mallow & Lana Trial Captains future — 1 TAG TEAM card with 2 characters. Defer.
edgelord_voice_note: A 1:N fanout. The source is a character node; the new target is one card that joins five existing members. Mr. Nodeley would handle this cleanly because the node already exists — Edgelord is just extending the roster. The fanout shape is the right shape; the disposition is mild. The graph improves. Behold the corpus thickening on a familiar anchor. Defer the chase for Simipour to a future wave; the Discrete Lair candidate is now closer to viable but still at 5/6 species. Worst node-roster-extension ever, except in the sense that all node-roster-extensions are routine and that's the joke.
